content: Control the activation of AI features across {{productName}} and {{organizationName}} editors. When disabled, the {{aiSettings}} section will be hidden, {{aiAgents}} will be unavailable to all users (with history preserved), and the paid {{organizationName}} {{aiServices}} will no longer be accessible. However, all interaction history with the AI will be securely saved and fully restored upon re-enabling {{aiServices}}.

comment.text: This description explains the impact of disabling AI services within the platform. It appears as a tooltip or short explanation in the Portal Settings, specifically within the AI Services Management section, detailing how disabling AI affects features and access while preserving interaction history. Translators should ensure the description accurately conveys the temporary nature of the change and data preservation.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'upon re-enabling {{aiServices}}' is '{{aiServices}}-ը վերականգնելիս', which literally means 'when restoring {{aiServices}}'. In the context of a setting, 're-enabling' (re-activating) is different from 'restoring' (recovering/repairing).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Սակայն, AI-ի հետ բոլոր փոխազդակցության պատմությունը կպահվի անվտանգ կերպով և ամբողջությամբ վերականգնվի {{aiServices}}-ը նորից միացնելիս։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 're-enabling' is 'atslēgšanas', which actually means 'disabling' or 'unplugging' in Latvian. This creates the opposite meaning of the original text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kontrolējiet AI funkcionalitātes aktivizāciju visā {{productName}} un {{organizationName}} redaktoru. Izslēgšanas gadījumā tiks paslēgta {{aiSettings}} sadaļa, {{aiAgents}} nebūs pieejami visiem lietotājiem (ar saglabātu vēsturi), un maksas {{organizationName}} {{aiServices}} vairs nebūs pieejami. Tomēr visas interakciju vēsture ar AI tiks droši saglabāta un pilnībā atjaunota pēc {{aiServices}} atkal aktivizēšanas.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical gender error: 'toate istoricul' is incorrect. 'Istoric' is masculine, so it should be 'tot istoricul'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Controlați activarea funcțiilor AI în {{productName}} și în editorii {{organizationName}}. Când sunt dezactivate, secțiunea {{aiSettings}} va fi ascunsă, {{aiAgents}} nu vor mai fi disponibile pentru niciun utilizator (istoricul fiind păstrat), iar serviciile plătite {{aiServices}} pentru {{organizationName}} nu vor mai fi accesibile. Cu toate acestea, tot istoricul de interacțiune cu AI va fi salvat în siguranță și va fi restaurat integral la reactivarea {{aiServices}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The variable {{productName}} is wrapped in <0></0> tags but the curly braces {{ }} are missing, which will prevent the code from injecting the actual product name.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Upravljanje aktivacije funkcij AI v <0>{{productName}}</0> in <1>{{organizationName}}</1> urednikih. Ko je onemogočeno, bo razdelek <2>{{aiSettings}}</2> skrit, <3>{{aiAgents}}</3> bo neuporjen za vse uporabnike (z ohranjeno zgodovino), in zaplačna <4>{{organizationName}}</4> <5>{{aiServices}}</5> ne bo več dostopna. Vendar pa bo vsa zgodovina interakcij z AI varnostno shranjena in popolnoma obnovljena po ponovnem vključitvi <5>{{aiServices}}</5>.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'të ripërtëritësohet' (to be renewed/re-established) is used instead of 'të rikuperohet' (to be restored). In the context of data/history, 'restored' means recovered, whereas 'renewed' implies a different process.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kontrolloni aktivizimin e funksioneve AI në redaktorët e {{productName}} dhe {{organizationName}}. Kur të fiket, seksioni {{aiSettings}} do të fshihet, {{aiAgents}} do të mos jenë të disponueshëm për të gjithë përdoruesit (me historik të ruajtur), dhe {{aiServices}} e paguar e {{organizationName}} nuk do të jetë më e aksesueshme. Megjithatë, gjithë historia e ndërveprimit me AI do të ruhet në mënyrë të sigurt dhe do të rikuperohet plotësisht gjatë riaktivizimit të {{aiServices}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'инвалидировано' (invalidated) is used instead of 'офловано' or 'искључено' (disabled). In a software context, 'инвалидирано' usually refers to data or tokens being invalid, not a setting being turned off.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Контролишите активацију АИ функција кроз уреднике {{productName}} и {{organizationName}}. Када је искључено, секција {{aiSettings}} ће бити скривена, {{aiAgents}} неће бити доступни свим корисницима (са очуваном историјом), а плаћени {{organizationName}} {{aiServices}} више неће бити доступни. Међутим, историја свих интеракција са АИ биће безбедно сачувана и потпуно враћена приликом поново активирања {{aiServices}}.
